item.title: Crungeon
item.description: Welcome. You’re about to enter another level of personal development or a different perspective on creating your own environment not only in your mind but in a physical location. I call this place a Crungeon. The Crungeon blog is a log of my journey of experiences in life, career, and personal development. This blog is meant to be a resource to those in need of clear decisions. Not everything here will be for everyone, but it is here to “pass papers” to other men working on striving to be the best version of themselves.
item.content:
Welcome. You’re about to enter another level of personal development or a different perspective on creating your own environment not only in your mind but in a physical location. I call this place a Crungeon.

The Crungeon blog is a log of my journey of experiences in life, career, and personal development. This blog is meant to be a resource to those in need of clear decisions. Not everything here will be for everyone, but it is here to “pass papers” to other men working on striving to be the best version of themselves.

A Crungeon

Now that you know why this blog exists let’s look at what a Crungeon is.

A Crungeon is a location where you spend most of your time improving yourself. This could be a gym, your house, a location in the part of the house, your garage. Any place where you feel comfortable developing a skill.

You see we create our reality and just to say “yeah, that’s my office” is some shit. You control your experience and if you want a weak experience when working on yourself, that’s what you are going to get. Add another level to your existence.

For me, this is the living room where I have my couch, TV, and standing desk. It’s more than just what is described here. It’s an immersive experience. I make it known when people are over that they have walked into the Crungeon.
